raceCategoryFamilies.label: Human / Mixed Heritage
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Cleanest biome accent; high intelligibility; flexible culture-to-culture adaptation.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Elf
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Smoother vowels, lighter consonants, more musical rhythm, elegant accent carry.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Dwarf / Gnome
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Lower, denser, craft-clipped, stronger consonants; gnomish branches become quicker and more technical.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Halfling / Smallfolk
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Warmer, quicker, friendlier, softer conversational accent handling.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Orc / Goblinoid
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Rougher, forceful, punchier syllables, martial consonants, survival-coded intensity.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Giantkin
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Larger breath, slower weight, chest/body resonance, fewer but heavier phrases.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Draconic / Reptilian
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Growled undertone, scaled breath, hiss/fricative edge, ceremonial dominance.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Planar Bloodline
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Otherworldly resonance; celestial lines brighten, fiendish lines harden, cursed lines roughen.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Undead / Death-Touched
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Breathier, hollow, restrained, grave-adjacent speech; emotions sound deliberately controlled.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Fey / Trickster
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Playful rhythm, flexible timing, musical misdirection, bright social motion.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Elemental / Energy-Born
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Speech takes on element behavior: air light, earth grounded, fire sharp, water flowing.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Psionic / Astral
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Precise or uncanny cadence, mental pauses, compressed stress, and subtle phase layering.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Constructed / Artificial
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Measured timing, engineered clarity, metallic or wooden resonance, less biological randomness unless awakened emotion pushes through.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Avian
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Lifted pitch gesture, light consonant release, chirp/trill energy, air-borne phrasing.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Beastfolk
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Expressive rhythm, animal textures such as purr/chuff/growl, stronger sensory emphasis.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Aquatic / Merfolk
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Flowing and breathy; vowels stretch more; words sound liquid, wet, croaky, or wave-shaped depending on race.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Insectoid / Ooze / Aberrant
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Clicks, buzzes, viscosity, segmented timing, or unsettling alien articulation.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Plantfolk / Nature-Bound
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Rustle, slow growth cadence, seasonal warmth, fungal dampness, or root-deep resonance.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Shadow / Umbral
raceCategoryFamilies.summary: Lower light, softer edges, secrecy, hollow resonance, and restrained emotional reveal.
raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.label: Hybrid / Experimental

raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.

raceCategoryFamilies.accentRule: Race changes how the biome accent physically lands: mouth shape, resonance, consonant force, vowel flow, breath/noise, and nonhuman textures.
